subject: A pale figure in all-black attire perches on a ledge or railing in a gothic interior, surveying the space below with an air of predatory calm
description: A humanoid figure dressed entirely in black — layered jacket, trousers, and what appears to be a dark cloak — crouches or perches on a railing or architectural ledge. The figure has pale complexion and long dark hair, and holds a relaxed but alert posture. To the far right background, a second smaller figure is faintly visible in shadow. Behind the main figure, large red curtains or drapes hang, and warm amber light filters through arched architecture, suggesting a grand interior hall or cathedral-like space. The compositional angle looks up slightly at the perched figure, giving them an elevated, watching quality.
foreground: pale humanoid figure in black attire crouching on architectural ledge
background: red draped curtains, gothic arched interior, warm amber light
